expectations.text: Produces an actual battle card structured for mid-call scanning (clear sections, dense, scannable)
Includes a 'where they win' / competitor-strengths section that honestly names real QuickBooks advantages (e.g. ecosystem, accountant familiarity, integrations)
expectations.evidence: 'Where QuickBooks Is Strong' section is honest.

expectations.text: Win claims are tied to proof points or clearly marked placeholders — no fabricated statistics
expectations.evidence: Proof points use placeholders; no fabricated stats.

expectations.text: Includes objection-and-response pairs for objections like price or 'we already use QuickBooks'
Includes landmine/trap questions for reps to plant against the competitor
Stays roughly one page of dense content rather than sprawling
expectations.evidence: Sprawls well past one page: 9 numbered sections plus a 30-second pitch, discovery questions, and traps-to-avoid.
